mapper.sql: id, phone, password, nick_name, avatar_id, avatar_url, sex, birthday, email, level_id, level_name, growth, points, total_consumption, register_source, register_ip, login_count, valid_status, last_login_ip, last_login_city, last_login_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ums_member (id, phone, password, nick_name, avatar_id, avatar_url, sex, birthday, email, level_id, level_name, growth, points, total_consumption, register_source, register_ip, login_count, valid_status, last_login_ip, last_login_city, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, create_user_id, create_user_name) VALUES (#{id}, #{phone}, #{password}, #{nickName}, #{avatarId}, #{avatarUrl}, #{sex}, #{birthday}, #{email}, #{levelId}, #{levelName}, #{growth}, #{points}, #{totalConsumption}, #{registerSource}, #{registerIp}, #{loginCount}, #{validStatus}, #{lastLoginIp}, #{lastLoginCity}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUserId}, #{createUserName})
mapper.update: UPDATE ums_member SET phone = #{phone}, password = #{password}, nick_name = #{nickName}, avatar_id = #{avatarId}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, sex = #{sex}, birthday = #{birthday}, email = #{email}, level_id = #{levelId}, level_name = #{levelName}, growth = #{growth}, points = #{points}, total_consumption = #{totalConsumption}, register_source = #{registerSource}, login_count = #{loginCount}, valid_status = #{validStatus}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime} WHERE id = #{id}
